sourcesContent: /* Keep the header fixed at the top and make it smaller */ .header { position: fixed; /* Keeps the header fixed at the top of the page */ top: 0; left: 0; width: 100%; /* Full width */ background-color: #fff; /* White background */ padding: 8px 0; /* Reduce padding to make the header smaller */ box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); /* Adds a subtle shadow for depth */ z-index: 1000; /* Ensures the header stays on top of other elements */ } /* Push content down to prevent it from being hidden under the fixed header */ .body-content { padding-top: 60px; /* Adjust this based on the new header height */ } /* Smaller title styling */ h1 { color: #333; /* Dark grey text color */ font-size: 1.5rem; /* Reduce font size */ margin: 0; /* Remove default margin */ } /* Compact navigation bar */ nav { display: flex; /* Arrange navigation links in a row */ justify-content: center; /* Center align the links */ gap: 15px; /* Add space between links */ font-weight: bold; /* Make links bold */ } /* Styling for navigation links */ nav a { text-decoration: none; /* Remove underlines */ font-size: 1rem; /* Reduce font size */ padding: 5px 10px; /* Reduce padding for a compact look */ color: #007bff; /* Blue text color */ border-radius: 5px; /* Rounded corners */ transition: 0.3s; /* Smooth transition effect */ } /* Hover effect for navigation links */ nav a:hover { background: #007bff; /* Blue background on hover */ color: white; /* White text color on hover */ }
